title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with AU Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About AU Small Finance Bank:
AU Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank!
